update.releaseNotes:
v5.5.0 - Changelog
Adjustments --- - Update game data up to `Yaeno Muteki` (2026-04-19). - Stack multiple energy items toward ~100% energy instead of using only the lowest-gain item, while reserving one low-tier item for emergencies. - Remove the hardcoded 90-minute runtime cap so the bot can run for full career durations. - Refactor `Training.kt` and `Racing.kt` into a hook-based architecture so scenario-specific logic (Trackblazer, Unity Cup) lives in subclasses instead of scattered flags.
Fixes --- - Fix bug where the bot force-trains a stat that the analysis phase had already rejected for `low gain with charm` or `high failure chance`. It recovers energy/mood as a fallback instead. - Fix bug where the bot still clicks "Try Again" on lost G1/G2/G3 races in Trackblazer when `Disable Race Retries` was enabled. - Fix rare bug for `IllegalArgumentException: y must be >= 0` crash in `determineTurnsRemainingBeforeNextGoal()` by clamping OCR crop regions to the bitmap bounds.
